title: Math & Geometry + Guardrails
focus: Rotate Image / Spiral Matrix + layered guardrails (input → schema → policy → output).

items.label: Prompt injection & jailbreaks (OWASP LLM Top 10)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through 4 guardrail layers — what each catches.

items.label: Layered guardrail patterns (NeMo Guardrails)
